targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) as queries 
FROM log_entries 
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) as blocked 
FROM log_entries 
WHERE reason LIKE 'BLOCKED%' 
  AND request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))

SELECT 
  ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE reason LIKE 'BLOCKED%')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100), 2) as percent_blocked
FROM log_entries 
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT question_name) as domains 
FROM log_entries 
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))

SELECT 
  $__timeGroup(request_ts, '1m') AS time,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE reason NOT LIKE 'BLOCKED%') as "Allowed",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE reason LIKE 'BLOCKED%') as "Blocked"
FROM log_entries
WHERE $__timeFilter(request_ts)
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT 
  question_type as "Query Type",
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM log_entries
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))
GROUP BY question_type
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
  response_type as "Response Type",
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM log_entries
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))
GROUP BY response_type
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT 
  question_name as "Domain",
  COUNT(*) as "Queries"
FROM log_entries
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND reason NOT LIKE 'BLOCKED%'
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))
GROUP BY question_name
ORDER BY "Queries" DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
  question_name as "Domain",
  COUNT(*) as "Queries"
FROM log_entries
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND reason LIKE 'BLOCKED%'
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))
GROUP BY question_name
ORDER BY "Queries" DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
  client_ip as "Client IP",
  client_name as "Client Name",
  COUNT(*) as "Queries"
FROM log_entries
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))
GROUP BY client_ip, client_name
ORDER BY "Queries" DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
  reason as "Block Reason",
  COUNT(*) as "Queries"
FROM log_entries
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))
GROUP BY reason
ORDER BY "Queries" DESC

SELECT 
  hostname as "Hostname",
  COUNT(*) as "Queries",
  ROUND(AVG(duration_ms)::numeric, 2) as "Avg Duration"
FROM log_entries
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND hostname IS NOT NULL
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))
GROUP BY hostname
ORDER BY "Queries" DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
  request_ts as "Time",
  client_ip as "Client IP",
  client_name as "Client Name",
  question_name as "Domain",
  question_type as "Type",
  response_type as "Response",
  reason as "Reason",
  duration_ms as "Duration"
FROM log_entries
WHERE request_ts >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND request_ts <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND ('[[exclude_domain]]' = '' OR question_name !~ '[[exclude_domain]]')
  AND ('[[exclude_internal]]' != 'Yes' OR (question_name NOT LIKE '%.local.vember31.xyz' AND client_ip NOT LIKE '10.42.%'))
  AND ('${client_filter}' = '' OR client_ip = '${client_filter}' OR client_name = '${client_filter}')
  AND ('${domain_filter}' = '' OR question_name = '${domain_filter}')
  AND ('${reason_filter}' = '' OR reason = '${reason_filter}')
ORDER BY request_ts DESC
LIMIT 1000

panels.description: Total queries where the domain had valid DNSSEC signatures and passed validation successfully.
panels.title: Secure (Signed + Valid)

panels.description: Domains where DNSSEC was signed but validation failed — could indicate tampering or a misconfigured upstream. Should always be 0.
panels.title: Bogus (Failed Validation)

panels.description: Queries for domains that have no DNSSEC signing at all. This is common and not a security concern — just domains that haven't adopted DNSSEC yet.
panels.title: Unsigned (No DNSSEC)

panels.description: DNSSEC validation results served from cache instead of re-validated upstream — higher is better for performance.
panels.title: Validation Cache Hits

panels.description: Of all DNSSEC-signed domains queried, the percentage that passed validation. Should be near 100% — any drop warrants investigation.
panels.title: Signed Domain Success Rate

panels.description: DNSSEC validation activity over time. Bogus spikes (red) could indicate DNS tampering or a misconfigured signing chain on a remote domain. Unsigned (orange) reflects queries to domains without DNSSEC — expected to be high.
panels.title: DNSSEC Validation Activity

list.description: Filter query log by client IP or name
list.label: Client Filter
list.name: client_filter
